scenario: llm-wiki adapter recognize/index for an LLM Wiki root. schema.md/index.md/log.md are RESERVED (not concepts); raw/*.md are immutable sources; pages/**.md derive the open `type` from `pageKind`; xrefs + body links resolve to IndexDocument.links. SPECIFICATION golden (llm-wiki adapter = Chunk 4).
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — the llm-wiki adapter is built in CHUNK 4 (per the spec DEV-7 restore). This golden is authored NOW so Chunk 4 has its target.
specSource: docs/architecture/specs/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §7 (llm-wiki adapter row: 'schema.md, index.md, log.md, raw/, pages/, xrefs, citations, native ingest; wiki page kinds (adapter-owned)'), §6 (wiki-page row: 'its own type values; native wiki validation'), §0.2 (the `wiki` asset-type dies; the adapter is first-class), §1.2 (llm-wiki probe = schema.md + pages/), §9 (links = relationships).
realWorldSource: src/wiki/wiki.ts + src/assets/wiki/*-template.md — the akm LLM Wiki structure: schema.md/index.md/log.md at root (excluded from content surfaces), raw/<slug>.md immutable sources (first-class addressable), pages/<page>.md with frontmatter description/pageKind/xrefs/sources
notes: SPECIFICATION golden — the llm-wiki adapter lands in Chunk 4. RESERVED files (schema.md, index.md, log.md; identified by root position + `wikiRole` frontmatter) are recognized but NOT indexed as concepts — analogous to OKF's index.md/log.md reservation. index.md is regenerated by `akm index` and must never be indexed as content.

RESOLVED (open question 2, maintainer resolution 2026-07) — `type` for wiki pages is READING A, final for Chunk 4: a page's open `type` = its frontmatter `pageKind` (concept/entity/note/<custom>); raw sources get the adapter's own `type` = 'wiki-source'. CONSEQUENCE: none of concept/entity/note/wiki-source is in KNOWN_TYPES, so they render GENERICALLY (the extant `wiki-md` renderer stays UNUSED; see renderer.json). Reading B (emit a single `type` = 'wiki' for all pages, reuse wiki-md, carry pageKind as metadata) was CONSIDERED and REJECTED because it contradicts §0.2 (the `wiki` asset-type is retired). No longer an open question.

links (spec §9): the adapter resolves both `xrefs:` frontmatter and body bundle-relative markdown links into target conceptIds stored on IndexDocument.links. `sources:` frontmatter resolves to the cited raw conceptIds (citation edges), tracked for the uncited-raw lint check.
conceptId = path within the wiki root − .md (pages/http-caching, pages/entities/varnish, raw/2026-07-http-rfc).

schema.md.reason: Root schema.md (wikiRole: schema) — the rulebook. Recognized but NOT indexed as a concept (excluded from content surfaces, wiki.ts canonical-content contract). May be a coupling file whose change escalates to a component rescan (spec §4).

index.md.reason: Root index.md (wikiRole: index) — regenerated by `akm index`; NEVER indexed as a concept (would create a regeneration loop). Analogous to OKF's reserved index.md.

log.md.reason: Root log.md (wikiRole: log) — append-only agent log; NOT indexed as a concept.

raw/2026-07-http-rfc.md.name: 2026-07-http-rfc
raw/2026-07-http-rfc.md.derivation: immutable ingested source under raw/ → the adapter's own `type` = 'wiki-source' (RESOLVED, reading A). First-class addressable + searchable; lint tracks whether it is cited (it is).

pages/http-caching.md.name: http-caching
pages/http-caching.md.description: How HTTP caching decides freshness and revalidation.
pages/http-caching.md.derivation: pages/*.md → type = pageKind ('concept'). xref + body link resolve to pages/entities/varnish; sources cite raw/2026-07-http-rfc.

pages/entities/varnish.md.name: varnish
pages/entities/varnish.md.derivation: nested page pages/entities/varnish.md → type = pageKind ('entity'). Reciprocal xref to pages/http-caching; cites the same raw source.

pages/orphan.md.name: orphan
pages/orphan.md.description: A note whose only cross-reference points at a page that does not exist.
pages/orphan.md.derivation: type = pageKind ('note'). Its single xref target (pages/does-not-exist) does NOT exist — a BROKEN xref surfaced by validate (see lint.json). No sources → link orphan.
